metadata.title: Next App Mantine Tailwind Template
metadata.description: A modern Next.js template with Mantine UI and TailwindCSS

home.subtitle: This starter Next.js project includes a minimal setup for Mantine with TailwindCSS. To get started edit page.tsx file.

features.title: Features
features.mantineDesc: Beautiful and accessible React components with dark theme support
features.tailwindDesc: Utility-first CSS framework for rapid UI development
features.typescriptDesc: Full TypeScript support with strict type checking
features.i18nDesc: Multi-language support with optimized translation loading

common.errorDescription: We encountered an unexpected error. Please try refreshing the page.
common.pageNotFoundDescription: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
